name: FreeClaude Coding Agent
description: Integrates FreeClaude coding agent into OpenClaw. Provides /fc slash command for direct coding tasks and exposes FreeClaude as an MCP server for agent tool use.

wrapper.description: Path to the FreeClaude wrapper script (auto-detected if empty)

timeout.description: Default timeout in seconds for FreeClaude invocations

stateDir.description: Directory for persisted FreeClaude run/session metadata used by session-native orchestration
